---
title: "My ceramics journey!"
format: html
categories: [Past ceramics work]
image: ceramics2.png
draft: false

---
Here is some of my past ceramics work! 

![](ceramics1.png)
![](ceramics2.png) 


![](ceramics3.png) 


![](ceramics4.png) 


![](ceramics5.png) 


![](ceramics6.png) 


![](ceramics7.png) 


![](ceramics8.png) 


![](ceramics9.png) 


![](ceramics10.png)
